history.en: The Bambino is a breed of cat that was created as a cross between the Sphynx and the Munchkin breeds. The Bambino cat has short legs, large upright ears, and is usually hairless. They love to be handled and cuddled up on the laps of their family members.
history.zh: 班比诺猫是斯芬克斯猫和曼基康猫杂交培育的品种。班比诺猫腿短，耳朵大而直立，通常无毛。它们喜欢被抚摸和依偎在家人的腿上。

overview.en: The Bambino is a rare, affectionate, and lively breed known for its short legs, large upright ears, and hairless or very short coat. As a cross between the Sphynx and Munchkin, it combines the Sphynx's loving, people-oriented personality with the Munchkin's playful, curious nature. Bambinos are exceptionally friendly, intelligent, and social, thriving on human interaction and lap time. They are often described as dog-like in their loyalty and eagerness to follow their owners around. Despite their short stature, they are agile and energetic, enjoying interactive play and climbing. Their lack of fur makes them particularly warm to the touch and ideal for cuddling. They are generally healthy but require special attention to skin care and temperature regulation. This breed is best suited for owners who can provide constant companionship and a warm, stimulating environment.
overview.zh: 班比诺猫是一种稀有、深情且活泼的品种，以其短腿、大而直立的耳朵以及无毛或极短被毛而闻名。作为斯芬克斯猫和曼基康猫的杂交后代，它兼具斯芬克斯猫的亲人、以人为中心的个性，以及曼基康猫的顽皮、好奇天性。班比诺猫异常友好、聪明且善于社交，非常依赖人类的互动和膝上时光。它们常被描述为具有犬类般的忠诚，喜欢跟随主人到处走动。尽管身材矮小，但它们敏捷且精力充沛，喜欢互动游戏和攀爬。由于没有毛发，它们摸起来特别温暖，非常适合拥抱。它们通常健康，但需要特别注意皮肤护理和体温调节。这个品种最适合能提供持续陪伴和温暖、刺激环境的主人。

care.en: Daily care for a Bambino requires attention to its unique hairless or very short coat. Because they lack fur to absorb oils, their skin produces more sebum, so weekly baths with a gentle, cat-safe shampoo are essential to prevent greasiness and acne. Wipe their ears regularly with a damp cloth to remove wax buildup, and trim their nails every two weeks. Their large ears need inspection for debris. As indoor-only cats, they need moderate exercise: at least 20–30 minutes of interactive play daily using wand toys or puzzle feeders. They love climbing, so provide cat trees with low platforms. Due to their short legs, avoid high jumps. Annual vet visits for vaccinations and health checks are crucial. Monitor for skin infections, dental issues, and temperature sensitivity—they chill easily and may need sweaters in cooler weather. Sunscreen is necessary if they go near windows.
care.zh: 班比诺猫的日常护理需要关注其无毛或极短被毛的特殊性。由于缺乏毛发吸收油脂，它们的皮肤会产生更多皮脂，因此每周用温和的猫咪专用香波洗澡一次，以防止油腻和粉刺。定期用湿布擦拭耳朵以清除耳垢，每两周修剪一次指甲。它们的大耳朵需要检查是否有杂物。作为纯室内猫，它们需要适度运动：每天至少20-30分钟的互动游戏，使用逗猫棒或益智喂食器。它们喜欢攀爬，因此提供带有低平台的猫爬架。由于腿短，避免让它们从高处跳跃。每年一次的兽医疫苗接种和健康检查至关重要。需监测皮肤感染、牙齿问题及温度敏感——它们容易受凉，在凉爽天气可能需要穿毛衣。如果靠近窗户，需涂抹宠物防晒霜。

training.en: Bambinos are highly intelligent and eager to please, making them very trainable. Use positive reinforcement techniques like treats, praise, and clicker training. They can learn tricks such as sit, high-five, and fetch, and can even be leash-trained for supervised outdoor walks. Start training early, focusing on socialization with people, other pets, and new environments. Because they are sensitive to temperature, train them to accept clothing gradually. Short, frequent sessions (5–10 minutes) work best to hold their attention. Avoid punishment, as they respond poorly to harsh methods. Consistency is key—use the same cues for commands. They are curious and may try to open cabinets or drawers, so train them to stay off counters using redirection and reward-based boundaries. Their intelligence also means they need mental stimulation; puzzle toys and treat-dispensing games prevent boredom and destructive behavior.
training.zh: 班比诺猫非常聪明且渴望取悦主人，因此训练性很强。使用正面强化方法，如零食、表扬和响片训练。它们可以学会坐下、击掌和捡球等技巧，甚至能接受牵绳训练，进行有监督的户外散步。从小开始训练，重点在于社交化——接触人群、其他宠物和新环境。由于它们对温度敏感，需逐步训练它们接受穿衣。短时、频繁的训练（每次5-10分钟）最能吸引它们的注意力。避免惩罚，因为它们对严厉方法反应不佳。一致性是关键——对指令使用相同的提示词。它们好奇心强，可能试图打开橱柜或抽屉，因此通过引导和奖励来训练它们远离台面。它们的聪明也意味着需要精神刺激；益智玩具和零食投放游戏可防止无聊和破坏行为。

diet.en: Bambinos have a fast metabolism due to their lack of fur, which means they require a high-quality, protein-rich diet to maintain body heat and energy levels. Feed them a balanced diet of premium wet and dry cat food, with meat as the first ingredient. Wet food helps with hydration, which is important for skin health. Because they are prone to skin issues, consider foods with omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids for coat and skin support. Portion control is essential—despite their short legs, they can become overweight if overfed. Adult Bambinos typically need 1/3 to 1/2 cup of dry food per day, split into two meals, plus wet food. Consult your vet for specific calorie needs. Avoid foods with fillers like corn or wheat. Fresh water should always be available. Treats should be limited to 10% of daily calories. Monitor for food allergies, as some Bambinos may develop sensitivities to common proteins like chicken.
diet.zh: 班比诺猫由于缺乏毛发，新陈代谢较快，因此需要高质量、高蛋白的饮食来维持体温和能量。喂食均衡的优质湿粮和干粮，以肉类为首要成分。湿粮有助于补充水分，这对皮肤健康很重要。由于它们容易有皮肤问题，可考虑添加富含欧米伽-3和欧米伽-6脂肪酸的猫粮，以支持皮毛健康。控制食量至关重要——尽管腿短，但过度喂食仍可能导致肥胖。成年班比诺猫通常每天需要1/3到1/2杯干粮，分两餐喂食，外加湿粮。请咨询兽医以确定具体热量需求。避免含有玉米或小麦等填充物的猫粮。始终提供新鲜饮用水。零食应限制在每日热量摄入的10%以内。注意食物过敏，部分班比诺猫可能对常见蛋白质（如鸡肉）产生敏感反应。

livingTips.en: Bambinos are ideal for apartment living due to their small size and moderate activity needs. They are indoor-only cats, as their lack of fur makes them vulnerable to sunburn, cold, and predators. A warm, draft-free home is essential—keep temperatures between 21–26°C (70–78°F) and provide heated beds or blankets. They get along well with children and other pets, including cat-friendly dogs, if properly socialized. Their playful, gentle nature makes them good family companions, but supervise young children to avoid rough handling. They thrive on attention and should not be left alone for long hours; consider a companion pet if you work away from home. Provide vertical spaces like cat shelves with low access, as they cannot jump high. Secure windows and balconies. Use pet-safe heating pads in winter and avoid direct sunlight exposure. They are curious and may explore small spaces, so childproof cabinets and hide electrical cords.
livingTips.zh: 班比诺猫体型小巧、活动需求适中，非常适合公寓生活。它们必须是纯室内猫，因为缺少毛发使它们容易晒伤、受凉并面临天敌威胁。温暖、无穿风的家至关重要——保持室温在21-26°C（70-78°F），并提供加热猫窝或毯子。如果经过适当社交，它们能与儿童和其他宠物（包括对猫友好的狗）友好相处。它们顽皮、温和的天性使其成为优秀的家庭伴侣，但需监督幼儿，避免粗暴对待。它们渴望关注，不应长时间独处；若你外出工作，考虑养另一只宠物作伴。提供低矮的猫架等垂直空间，因为它们无法跳高。确保窗户和阳台安全。冬季使用宠物安全加热垫，避免阳光直射。它们好奇心强，可能探索狭小空间，因此需对橱柜进行儿童安全防护并隐藏电线。
